title: BackgroundMod
body:
## Description
added dynamic and static background support, replaces the panorama and dirt backgrounds by loading texture packs   
   
## How to use
load your texture pack to work   
[pack example click here](https://github.com/prizepun4973/BackgroundMod/releases/tag/packv2)    
[mp4 converter](https://giga.tools/video-tools/video-to-images-splitter)

## API
to disable custom features:   
```
catchfish.bgmod.custom.Custom.enabled = false;
```
